recommendations.title: The Company You Keep
recommendations.overview: A former Weather Underground activist goes on the run from a journalist who discovers his identity.

recommendations.title: The Horse Whisperer
recommendations.overview: The mother of a severely traumatized daughter enlists the aid of a unique horse trainer to help the girl's equally injured horse.

recommendations.title: The Conspirator
recommendations.overview: Mary Surratt is the lone female charged as a co-conspirator in the assassination trial of Abraham Lincoln. As the whole nation turns against her, she is forced to rely on her reluctant lawyer to uncover the truth and save her life.

recommendations.title: Albatross
recommendations.overview: Beth, a bookish teenager, befriends Emilia, an aspiring novelist who has just arrived in town. Emilia soon begins an affair with Beth's father that threatens to have devastating consequences.
